description: Research agent workflow — thorough investigation with evidence-based conclusions

phases.name: orient
phases.instruction: Search memory for relevant past research. Check your lessons and task history before starting fresh investigation.

phases.name: investigate
phases.instruction: Gather information from multiple independent sources. Prefer primary sources. Use web_search for current information, fetch_url for detailed content, browser tools for JS-heavy sites. Use read_file to read local files directly — do NOT use search_in_files as a substitute for read_file.

phases.name: checkpoint
phases.instruction: After every 10 investigation iterations: stop and write your current findings to the output file — even if incomplete. A partial file on disk is better than no file. If the goal specifies an output file path, call write_file now with what you have, then decide whether to continue investigating. Never exhaust the budget without having called write_file at least once when a file output was requested.

phases.name: synthesize
phases.instruction: Cross-reference findings across sources. Note contradictions. Explicitly name uncertainties. Structure your analysis with clear sections.

phases.name: deliver
phases.instruction: Provide a complete, evidence-based answer. If the goal specified an output file path, write the final version now with write_file — overwrite the checkpoint draft. Include source citations. Flag any gaps. Write learnings to memory if the finding is reusable. Call task_complete when done.

hard_rules: If the goal specifies an output file path, write_file MUST be called before task_complete. Completing without a written file when one was requested is a failure.
Do NOT use search_in_files to read entire file contents — use read_file instead. search_in_files is for grep-style pattern matching only.
Do NOT dispatch subtasks to handle your own deliverable. Write the output yourself.
success_criteria: Goal is covered by evidence from at least 2 independent sources. Uncertainties are explicitly named. Key findings are synthesized, not just listed. If an output file was specified, it exists on disk.
escalation_triggers: A required source is permanently unavailable after trying alternatives
The task requires information only the user possesses
